osis.pipeline.vpcendpoint.CfnAbout: An OpenSearch Ingestion-managed VPC endpoint that will access one or more pipelines.

osis.pipeline.vpcendpoint.VpcEndpointId.Description: The unique identifier of the endpoint.

osis.pipeline.vpcendpoint.VpcId.Description: The ID for your VPC. AWS PrivateLink generates this value when you create a VPC.

osis.pipeline.vpcendpoint.VpcOptions.Description: Information about the VPC, including associated subnets and security groups.
